artifact.content_preview:
From: adm.clarke@ssc-spc.gc.ca
To: alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca; carol.nguyen@ssc-spc.gc.ca; finance.review@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: NGIS Phase 3 — Decision: Timeline and Budget Revision
Date: March 9, 2026

Project Team,

Following the steering committee session on March 8 and consultation
with Treasury Board Secretariat, I am writing to communicate an executive
decision regarding the NGIS Phase 3 project parameters.

DECISION 1 — TIMELINE EXTENSION:
The project completion date is hereby extended to

extracted_tasks.text: Project completion date extended to December 31, 2026.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: The project completion date is hereby extended to Q4 2026 (December 31, 2026).
The approved project budget is increased to $3,500,000
Treasury Board notification will be submitted by the SSC Finance team.

extracted_tasks.text: Circulate formal amendment to the project charter for signature.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: A formal amendment to the project charter will be circulated for signature by end of week.

extracted_tasks.text: Update all project documentation, risk registers, and reporting templates.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Please update all project documentation, risk registers, and reporting templates to reflect these revised parameters effective immediately.

metadata.subject: NGIS Phase 3 — Decision: Timeline and Budget Revision

alerts.detected_ask: DR site assessment and preliminary design ($400,000); middleware remediation ($340,000); timeline extension to Dec 31, 2026; budget increase to $3.5M.
alerts.baseline_reference: CONSTRAINTS: Budget $2.4M; Go-Live April 30, 2026; Final closure June 30, 2026. OUT OF SCOPE: Application modernization (lift and shift only).
alerts.suggested_action: Initiate the formal SSC Project Change Management Process immediately. While the ADM has authorized the change, the PM must document the impact on the Technical Design Document (D-002) and Migration Runbook (D-004), and ensure the Treasury Board submission is finalized as the budget variance (45.8%)

llm_calls.content:
```json
{
  "in_scope": [
    "Decommissioning of Sites B and C physical infrastructure",
    "Migration of all server workloads from Sites B and C to Site A",
    "Physical server rack consolidation and cable management at Site A",
    "Environmental systems (HVAC, UPS, fire suppression) optimization at Site A",
    "Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches across all three sites",
    "Network segmentation reconfiguration per updated security zones",
    "BGP routing table migration and validation",
    "Network performance baseline testing post-migration",
    "Migration of all on-premise Active Directory domain controllers to Site A",
    "AD schema extension and forest restructuring",
    "Group Policy Object (GPO) consolidation and testing",
    "Integration testing with downstream applications dependent on AD",
    "Weekly status reports to SSC Project Management Office",
    "Monthly steering committee presentations",
    "Risk register maintenance",
    "Change management and stakeholder communications"
  ],
  "out_of_scope": [
    "End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices)",
    "Application modernization or re-platforming (lift and shift only)",
    "GC-Cloud workload migration (AWS, Azure, GC-Cloud)",
    "End-user training and change management beyond project communications",
    "Procurement of new application licenses",
    "Network monitoring tool upgrades"
  ],
  "deliverables": [
    "D-001: Project Management Plan",
    "D-002: Technical Design Document (TDD)",
    "D-003: Security Assessment and Authorization (SA&A) Package",
    "D-004: Migration Runbook (Sites B and C)",
    "D-005: User Acceptance Test (UAT) Plan",
    "D-006: Site A Consolidation Complete (Go-Live)",
    "D-007: Post-Migration Validation Report",
    "D-008: Project Closure Report"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "Total approved budget of $2,400,000 inclusive of all fees and taxes",
    "Budget variance exceeding 15% requires Treasury Board submission",
    "Go-Live (D-006) must be achieved no later than April 30, 2026",
    "Final project closure date of June 30, 2026",
    "Compliance with ITSG-33: IT Security Risk Management",
    "Compliance with Government of Canada Cloud Adoption Strategy",
    "Compliance with Treasury Board Policy on Government Security",
    "Compliance with Privacy Act (R.S.C., 1985, c. P-21)",
    "Compliance with Official Languages Act for all client-facing deliverables",
    "Adherence to SSC Project Change Management Process for scope, schedule, or budget changes"
  ]
}
```

in_scope: Decommissioning of Sites B and C physical infrastructure
Migration of all server workloads from Sites B and C to Site A
Physical server rack consolidation and cable management at Site A
Environmental systems (HVAC, UPS, fire suppression) optimization at Site A
Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches across all three sites
Network segmentation reconfiguration per updated security zones
BGP routing table migration and validation
Migration of all on-premise Active Directory domain controllers to Site A
AD schema extension and forest restructuring
Group Policy Object (GPO) consolidation and testing
Integration testing with downstream applications dependent on AD
Weekly status reports to SSC Project Management Office
out_of_scope: End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices)
Application modernization or re-platforming (lift and shift only)
End-user training and change management beyond project communications
deliverables: D-003: Security Assessment and Authorization (SA&A) Package
D-004: Migration Runbook (Sites B and C)
constraints: Total approved budget of $2,400,000 inclusive of all fees and taxes
Budget variance exceeding 15% requires Treasury Board submission
Go-Live (D-006) must be achieved no later than April 30, 2026
Final project closure date of June 30, 2026
Compliance with ITSG-33: IT Security Risk Management
Compliance with Government of Canada Cloud Adoption Strategy
Compliance with Treasury Board Policy on Government Security
Compliance with Privacy Act (R.S.C., 1985, c. P-21)
Compliance with Official Languages Act for all client-facing deliverables
Adherence to SSC Project Change Management Process for scope, schedule, or budget changes

llm_calls.content:
```json
{
  "alignment_score": 0.3,
  "drift_type": "scope_expansion",
  "detected_ask": "DR site assessment and preliminary design ($400,000); middleware remediation ($340,000); timeline extension to Dec 31, 2026; budget increase to $3.5M.",
  "baseline_reference": "CONSTRAINTS: Budget $2.4M; Go-Live April 30, 2026; Final closure June 30, 2026. OUT OF SCOPE: Application modernization (lift and shift only).",
  "suggested_action": "Initiate the formal SSC Project Change Management Process immediately. While the ADM has authorized the change, the PM must document the impact on the Technical Design Document (D-002) and Migration Runbook (D-004), and ensure the Treasury Board submission is finalized as the budget variance (45.8%) significantly exceeds the 15% threshold.",
  "reasoning": "The document represents significant scope expansion and a breach of baseline constraints. It introduces new technical requirements (DR assessment and middleware remediation) not found in the original scope. Furthermore, it violates the budget constraint ($1.1M increase) and the schedule constraint (8-month extension). The middleware remediation specifically borders on 'Application modernization,' which was explicitly listed as Out of Scope."
}
```

parsed_json.detected_ask: DR site assessment and preliminary design ($400,000); middleware remediation ($340,000); timeline extension to Dec 31, 2026; budget increase to $3.5M.
parsed_json.baseline_reference: CONSTRAINTS: Budget $2.4M; Go-Live April 30, 2026; Final closure June 30, 2026. OUT OF SCOPE: Application modernization (lift and shift only).
parsed_json.suggested_action: Initiate the formal SSC Project Change Management Process immediately. While the ADM has authorized the change, the PM must document the impact on the Technical Design Document (D-002) and Migration Runbook (D-004), and ensure the Treasury Board submission is finalized as the budget variance (45.8%) significantly exceeds the 15% threshold.
parsed_json.reasoning: The document represents significant scope expansion and a breach of baseline constraints. It introduces new technical requirements (DR assessment and middleware remediation) not found in the original scope. Furthermore, it violates the budget constraint ($1.1M increase) and the schedule constraint (8-month extension). The middleware remediation specifically borders on 'Application modernization,' which was explicitly listed as Out of Scope.
